auth_access_model: The package is locally executable when installed; some optional LLM or remote-source actions depend on external credentials.

discovery_search.note: Role-aware term search is implemented through `find_terms()`.

metadata_schema.note: Package metadata, dictionaries, and validation workflows are core package features.

entity_lookup.note: The package can search semantic terms, but it is not an operational salmon identity graph.

identifier_crosswalks.note: The package supports semantic reconciliation and term requests, but not full operational crosswalk resolution.

abundance_assessment.note: The package is not an assessment data platform.

telemetry_passage.note: The package is not a telemetry platform.

hatchery.note: No hatchery-specific workflow is exposed in the current skill.

harvest_fishery.note: No harvest or fishery-specific workflow is exposed in the current skill.

genetics_gsi.note: No genetics or GSI-specific workflow is exposed in the current skill.

package_metadata_export.note: Package validation and package-oriented workflows are the core value of `metasalmon`.

provenance_versioning.note: Ontology fetch caching and package checks help, but the plugin does not yet expose the full provenance and publication workflow.

bulk_access_api_ergonomics.note: The current adapter is local-R based rather than a full external API wrapper.

blockers: The plugin only exposes a thin adapter surface today.
Some advanced workflows depend on local package installation and optional credentials.
governance_constraints: LLM-assisted features and publication helpers may depend on external provider setup and human review.
